title: Proclamation No. 525, s. 1965
text:
MALACAÑANG

RESIDENCE OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE PHILIPPINES MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 525

EXCLUDING FROM THE OPERATION OF PROCLAMATION NO. 69 DATED SEPTEMBER 23, 1954 WHICH ESTABLISHED THE RESERVATION FOR GOVERNMENT CENTER PURPOSES IN THE CITY OF ZAMBOANGA, PHILIPPINES, CERTAIN PORTIONS OF LAND EMBRACED THEREIN AND DECLARING THE SAME OPEN TO DISPOSITION UNDER THE PROVISIONS OF THE PUBLIC LAND ACT.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Natural Resources and pursuant to the authority vested in me by law, I, DIOSDADO MACAPAGAL, President of the Philippines, do hereby exclude from the operation of Proclamation No. 69 dated September 23, 1954, which established the reservation for Government Center purposes in the City of Zamboanga, certain portions of the land embraced therein and declare the same open to disposition under the provisions of the Public Land Act, which parcels of land are more particularly described as as follows, to wit:

(Parcel 1)

A parcel of land (covered by Miscellaneous Application Msa-V-76092 and shown on the attached sketch plan of the City Engineer of Zamboanga), situated in the City of Zamboanga, Island of Mindanao. Bounded on the SE. and S., along lines 1-2-3, by Basilan Strait; on the W., along lines 3-4-5, by Bayot’s, Hotel Area; on the NW. and W., along lines from corner 5 thence following the meandering boundary to corner 11 by Road; and on the E., along line 11-1, by Remaining portion of Petit Barracks (Plan 11-5387)° Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being S. 31 deg. 06 min, E., 628.00 meters from Mon. A, Zamboanga Townsite,

thence S. 85 deg. 01 mm. W., 19.79 meters to point 2; thence N. 57 deg. 31 min. W., 103.93 meters to point 3; thence N. 35 deg. 15 min. E., 25.00 meters to point 4; thence N. 58 deg. 58 min. E., 8.40 meters to point 5; thence S. 85 deg. 48 mm. E., 12.47 meters to point 6; thence S. 55 deg. 28 min. E., 55.84 meters to point 7; thence S. 64 deg. 26 min. E., 16.77 meters to point 8; thence S. 78 deg. 00 min. E., 14.00 meters to point 9; thence S. 69 deg. 00 min. E., 46.00 meters to point 10; thence 55 deg. 48 min. E., 12.26 meters to point 11; thence S. 29 deg. 00 mm. W., 13.50 meters to the point of beginning; containing an area of four thousand four hundred twenty five (4,425) square meters.

NOTE: All data are approximate and subject to change based on future surveys. This lot is inside 11-5387 (Petit Barracks).

(Parcel 2)

A parcel of land (covered by Miscellaneous Application Msa-V-77664 and shown on the attached sketch plan of the City Engineer of Zamhoanga), situated in the City of Zamboanga, Island of Mindanao. Bounded on the W., along line 1-2, by Philippine Red Cross Area; on the N., along line 2-3, by Asphalted Road; on the E., along line 3-4 by Proposed Road; and on the SE. and S., along lines 4-5-6-1, by Road. Beginning at a point marked 1 on plan, being S. 23 deg. 26 min. E., 450.03 meters from Mon. A., Zamboanga Townsite,

thence N. 28 deg. 02 min. E., 37.66 meters to point “2”; thence S. 61 deg. 30 min. E., 90.50 meters to point “3”; thence S. 30 deg. 30 deg. 30 min. W., 36.00 meters to point “4”; thence N. 80 deg. 15 min. :W., 21.56 meters to point “25”; thence N. 55 deg. 58 min. W., 11.63 meters to point “6”; thence N. 57 deg. 21 min. W., 57.09 meters to the point of beginning; containing an area of three thousand five hundred eighty-five (3,585) square meters.

NOTE: All data are approximate and subject to change based on future surveys. This lot is inside 11-5387 (Petit Barracks).

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 29th day of December, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and sixty-five.

DIOSDADO MACAPAGAL President of the Philippines

By the President: RAMON A. DIAZ Executive Secretary

Source : University of the Philippines, College of Law Library
